summary: Bootstrap-accounts Playwright script burnt 5/5 register attempts on first run because it didn't account for the 5/15min IP rate-limit
context: Built pilot-tester/scripts/bootstrap-accounts.ts to provision 5 sandbox accounts via Playwright sign-up. Fired 5 attempts in immediate succession — server-side rate-limit (5 per 15 min per IP, applyRateLimit prefix=register) returned 429 silently. Form errors weren't surfaced as toasts; the script saw 30s timeouts. Lost ~10 min debugging.
lesson: When automating against any rate-limited endpoint: read the limiter config first, then either (a) sleep long enough between calls OR (b) bypass via direct DB SQL when sandbox-only. We pivoted to direct DB INSERT — same approach that worked for migration recovery.
